description: Типы inline-иллюстраций для Excalibur BLOG. Обложка — отдельно (мем + герой). Inline — полезность по H2.
selection_rules: Один visual_type на inline; без повторов в одной статье, если есть альтернатива с score > 0
При равном score — приоритет: comparison_table_ui > workflow_diagram > checklist_board > schema_faq_ui > tool_screenshot > infographic_card
scene_hint дополняет шаблон типа конкретикой из H2 и lead статьи

comparison_table_ui.prompt_prefix: Professional Russian blog editorial UI mockup, clean SaaS dashboard aesthetic, light background #FAFAF7, accent #E85D4C, readable Cyrillic labels, 16:9 widescreen screenshot style,
comparison_table_ui.prompt_suffix: looks like a helpful pasted screenshot with pink sticky note corner and scotch tape, human-made Notion/Google Sheets vibe, subtle shadow, high detail Cyrillic UI, no host face
comparison_table_ui.negative: meme impact font, cartoon mascot, watermark, English UI labels, blurry text

workflow_diagram.prompt_prefix: Clean Russian infographic workflow diagram, numbered steps connected by arrows, editorial blog style, colors #FAFAF7 #1A1A2E #E85D4C #FFD93D, 16:9,
workflow_diagram.prompt_suffix: readable Cyrillic step titles on torn-paper workflow strip, marker arrows, taped checklist scrap, practical how-to, no meme faces
workflow_diagram.negative: meme, face closeup, watermark, chaotic collage, English text

checklist_board.prompt_prefix: Russian blog printable checklist board illustration, clipboard or kanban card layout, checkboxes and short Cyrillic items, editorial clean design, 16:9,
checklist_board.prompt_suffix: feels like real pre-publish checklist photo/screenshot on clipboard with red pen marks and tape, no meme character
checklist_board.negative: meme, impact font joke, watermark, English text, cartoon host

schema_faq_ui.prompt_prefix: Russian SEO article UI mockup showing FAQ accordion block and JSON-LD schema panel side by side, developer-blog aesthetic, light theme, 16:9,
schema_faq_ui.prompt_suffix: Cyrillic FAQ + schema JSON panel as fake browser/devtools screenshot with sticky note «проверь FAQ», helpful not meme, no host face
schema_faq_ui.negative: meme, cartoon face, watermark, English-only UI

tool_screenshot.prompt_prefix: Realistic stylized screenshot of a Russian SEO tool interface (Wordstat/Yandex Webmaster style), editorial blog illustration, 16:9,
tool_screenshot.prompt_suffix: Cyrillic UI, blurred fake personal data, educational screenshot for blog article, no meme
tool_screenshot.negative: meme, cartoon host, watermark, real brand logos if unclear

infographic_card.prompt_prefix: Minimal Russian infographic card for blog article, 3-4 bullet facts with icons, editorial palette #FAFAF7 #E85D4C, 16:9,
infographic_card.prompt_suffix: readable Cyrillic facts, professional not meme, useful takeaway visual
infographic_card.negative: meme, joke caption, watermark, English text
